violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item - cases of product in dry storage - was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration of 50ppm chlorine. Primed and corrected on sight.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item - gloves, napkins storedd on the floor - was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Clean the wall fan in the dish room.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
